# viettelidc_vks_node_group (Data Source)

Data source for VKS Node Group lookup.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the K8s Cluster.
- `id` (String) ID of the Node Group.

### Read-Only

- `desired_size` (Number) Desired size of the Node Group.
- `instance_type` (String) Instance type of the workers.
- `max_size` (Number) Maximum size of the Node Group.
- `min_size` (Number) Minimum size of the Node Group.
- `name` (String) Name of the Node Group.
- `status` (String) Status of the Node Group.
